items.label: Assessment
items.value: The requirement to validate the sending of physical postcards as appointment reminders for elderly patients without email is not directly supported by the evidence provided. The linked use case mentions this requirement, but there is no evidence confirming the implementation or functionality of this feature. Prior steps focus on other functionalities, indicating a gap in coverage for this specific requirement.
